settings.siteTitle: LMVK Group — Private Holding & Venture Group
settings.siteDescription: LMVK Group is a private holding and venture group creating premium projects across hospitality, technology, commerce and lifestyle.
settings.seoTitle: LMVK Group — Private Holding & Venture Group
settings.seoDescription: LMVK Group is a private holding and venture group creating premium projects across hospitality, technology, commerce and lifestyle.

hero.headline: Building brands with taste, discipline and long-term vision.
hero.subtitle: LMVK Group creates premium projects across hospitality, technology, commerce and lifestyle — built with patience, quality and clear identity.

brandEssence.statement: LMVK Group is a private holding and venture group focused on premium projects in hospitality, technology, commerce and lifestyle.

items.label: Positioning
items.statement: Quiet luxury, disciplined growth, clear identity.

philosophy.title: A disciplined approach to building brands.
philosophy.intro: Every project under LMVK Group must carry more than a name. It must have identity, quality, consistency and a reason to last.

principles.title: Discipline
principles.description: Strong brands are built through consistency, not noise.

principles.title: Value
principles.description: We build projects that can grow, mature and last.

portfolio.title: A curated group of projects with long-term direction.
portfolio.intro: LMVK Group brings together brands and business concepts that share one principle: they must create real value, not only attention.

featured.title: The first public expression of the LMVK philosophy.
featured.body: Golden Lama Coffee brings together precise execution, memorable identity and genuine human experience. It is built on the belief that hospitality is not only about product quality, but about making people feel better.

contact.title: Let's build something with long-term value.
contact.text: For partnerships, project opportunities or business communication, contact LMVK Group.

footer.claim: Building brands with taste, discipline and long-term vision.

projects.name: Golden Lama Coffee
projects.subtitle: Premium mobile coffee with identity, hospitality and human warmth.
projects.summary: A premium mobile coffee concept built around hospitality, design and the idea that coffee is the second product — the first product is a better day.
projects.description: Golden Lama Coffee is the first active project under LMVK Group. It combines mobile specialty coffee, refined visual identity and a hospitality-first approach. The goal is not only to serve coffee, but to create a moment that improves the day.

projects.name: Golden Studio
projects.subtitle: Digital products and AI-assisted workflows for practical business growth.
projects.summary: A future digital product studio focused on websites, apps, CMS systems and practical AI-assisted business workflows for small and growing businesses.
projects.description: Golden Studio is a future digital product studio focused on helping small and growing businesses create websites, apps, CMS systems and practical AI-assisted workflows. The idea is simple: make modern digital tools accessible, useful and directly connected to business value.

projects.name: Future Ventures
projects.subtitle: New brands and strategic projects developed under LMVK Group.
projects.summary: New brands and business concepts developed under the LMVK Group structure.
projects.description: Future Ventures represents upcoming business concepts and brand opportunities developed under the LMVK Group structure. Each future project must match the group philosophy: clear identity, long-term value and disciplined execution.
